effective_from_semantics: The snapshot is intended for transactions on or after this date; it is not necessarily the original levy date of every rate.
notes: Rates are total GST rates. For ordinary intra-state supplies, CGST and SGST are equal halves; inter-state supplies use IGST at the total rate.
Pre-packaged and labelled treatment depends on the statutory condition, including the retail-sale and not-more-than-25-kg-or-25-litre limits in Notification 01/2025-Central Tax (Rate).
A four- or eight-digit HSN example is not a binding classification of a branded SKU. Verify composition, packaging and the supplier invoice before production use.
MRP, cost, sell price, inventory and reorder values live in products.json and are illustrative demo data, not tax-source data.

sources.authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs
sources.title: GST Goods and Services Rates

sources.authority: Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue
sources.title: Notification No. 01/2025-Central Tax (Rate)

sources.authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs
sources.title: Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, sections 7 and 8
CGST Rules, Rule 35 - value inclusive of tax

sources.authority: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs
sources.title: CGST Act, section 170 - rounding off

rules.label: Wheat flour other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose wheat flour weighed or packed for the customer and not meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Cereal groats and meal other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose sooji or rava not meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Pulse flour other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose besan or other pulse flour not meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Rice other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose rice not meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Flattened or beaten rice other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose poha or flattened rice not meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Dried pulses other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Loose dried leguminous vegetables, shelled, whether or not skinned or split.

rules.label: Beet sugar and cane sugar
rules.applicability: Ordinary beet or cane sugar, including refined white sugar; excludes separately listed jaggery, khandsari and rab conditions.

rules.label: Jaggery, khandsari or rab other than pre-packaged and labelled
rules.applicability: Non-pre-packaged-and-labelled jaggery of all types, khandsari sugar or rab.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled wheat flour
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed wheat flour not exceeding 25 kg and required to bear Legal Metrology declarations.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled rice
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed rice not exceeding 25 kg and required to bear Legal Metrology declarations.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled dried pulses
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed dried leguminous vegetables not exceeding 25 kg and required to bear Legal Metrology declarations.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled pulse flour
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed besan or other qualifying pulse flour not exceeding 25 kg.

rules.label: Salt, all types
rules.applicability: Common and iodised salt classified under HSN 2501.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled jaggery, khandsari or rab
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed jaggery, khandsari sugar or rab not exceeding 25 kg or 25 litre as applicable.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled flattened or beaten rice
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed poha or flattened rice not exceeding 25 kg.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled oats
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed oats not exceeding 25 kg.

rules.label: Listed edible vegetable oils and preparations
rules.applicability: Edible oils matching the descriptions listed for HSN 1507 through 1518; confirm product composition.

rules.label: Butter, ghee and other milk fats or dairy spreads
rules.applicability: Butter, ghee, butter oil and dairy spreads under HSN 0405.

rules.label: Listed spices
rules.applicability: Pepper, chillies, cumin, coriander, turmeric and other spices matching the listed HSN descriptions.

rules.label: Sauces, mixed condiments and mixed seasonings
rules.applicability: Ketchup, sauces, curry paste and similar preparations under HSN 2103.

rules.label: Vegetables, fruit and other edible parts prepared or preserved by vinegar or acetic acid
rules.applicability: Pickles and similar preparations matching HSN 2001.

rules.label: Fresh and pasteurised milk excluding UHT milk
rules.applicability: Fresh or pasteurised milk, not concentrated and without added sugar, excluding UHT milk.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled curd, lassi or buttermilk
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed curd, lassi or buttermilk meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled chena or paneer
rules.applicability: Retail pre-packed chena or paneer meeting the pre-packaged-and-labelled condition.

rules.label: Cheese other than the specific paneer treatment
rules.applicability: Cheese under HSN 0406; does not override the specific paneer entries.

rules.label: Ice cream and other edible ice
rules.applicability: Ice cream and other edible ice under HSN 2105.

rules.label: Pasta, noodles, vermicelli and similar goods
rules.applicability: Pasta, noodles, vermicelli and similar products under HSN 1902.

rules.label: Prepared foods obtained from cereal flakes
rules.applicability: Corn flakes and similar prepared cereal foods not covered by a specific lower or Nil entry.

rules.label: Bread except pizza bread and when served for consumption
rules.applicability: Ordinary packaged bread matching the specific Nil-rate entry.

rules.label: Biscuits and listed bakers' wares
rules.applicability: Biscuits and bakers' wares under HSN 1905, subject to the specific exclusions in the rate schedule.

rules.label: Pre-packaged and labelled namkeen, bhujia and mixture
rules.applicability: Ready-to-eat pre-packed namkeen, bhujia, mixture, chabena and similar preparations under the listed entry.

rules.label: Prepared or preserved vegetables including potato chips
rules.applicability: Potato chips and similar prepared vegetables matching HSN 2005; verify formulation.

rules.label: Extruded or expanded savoury or salted products
rules.applicability: Cooked ready-to-eat extruded or expanded savoury products under tariff item 19059030; excludes uncooked snack pellets.

rules.label: Chocolate and food preparations containing cocoa
rules.applicability: Chocolate and cocoa-containing food preparations under HSN 1806.

rules.label: Tea, whether or not flavoured
rules.applicability: Tea under HSN 0902, excluding separately treated unprocessed green leaves.

rules.label: Coffee extracts, essences, concentrates and preparations
rules.applicability: Instant coffee and coffee preparations matching HSN 2101.

rules.label: Mineral, purified or sealed-container water
rules.applicability: Packaged drinking water under the taxable HSN 2201 entry, not the specific Nil-rate water entry.

rules.label: Fruit or nut juices and vegetable juices
rules.applicability: Fruit or vegetable juice matching HSN 2009; verify composition and labelling.

rules.label: Surface-active, washing and cleaning preparations
rules.applicability: Detergents, dishwashing liquids and household cleaning preparations under HSN 3402.

rules.label: Soap and qualifying skin-washing or detergent bars
rules.applicability: Soap, bathing bars and qualifying solid washing preparations under HSN 3401.

rules.label: Retail disinfectants
rules.applicability: Disinfectant preparations matching HSN 3808; verify formulation and claims.

rules.label: Preparations for use on the hair
rules.applicability: Shampoo and other hair preparations under HSN 3305, excluding specifically listed lower-rate goods.

rules.label: Preparations for oral or dental hygiene
rules.applicability: Toothpaste and oral-care preparations under HSN 3306, excluding specifically listed tooth powder.

rules.label: Beauty, make-up and skin-care preparations
rules.applicability: Non-medicament skin-care preparations under HSN 3304, subject to specific exclusions.

rules.label: Personal deodorants and other toilet preparations
rules.applicability: Personal deodorants and body sprays under HSN 3307, subject to the listed exclusions.

rules.label: Fresh or chilled vegetables
rules.applicability: Fresh or chilled vegetables matching the listed Chapter 07 headings.
